request_summary: Add SETUP tasks generation for new projects in temper-tasks agent

context.notes: Implemented SETUP tasks flow: new projects get mandatory foundation tasks (scaffolding, infrastructure patterns, entities) before feature tasks. Existing projects skip SETUP.

approved_plan.description: Create setup-tasks skill with full logic
Update temper-tasks.agent.md to ask project state and load setup-tasks skill
Update temper-plan.agent.md to handle SETUP tasks as Group 1 (sequential)
Update skills/README.md with new setup-tasks skill

next_action: All changes complete. SETUP tasks will be generated only for new projects when temper-tasks is executed.
